raw_consumer_statement: My husband and I went through a vacation resort package deal for over 4 hours, was verbally told we would pay {$40.00} per month for a two year trial membership to XXXX XXXX XXXX through Barclay credit card. Six weeks later was told by XXXX XXXXXXXX that we had a {$4000.00} balance on credit card. All presentation and documents were on electronic devices. We were deceived and lied to. Credit card initially gave us a credit, six weeks later put the charge back on. I hired a lawyer, but was not successful. This charge is wrong and many other XXXX  people have been taken advantage of! Please help us in this! I should not have to pay this fraudulent charge! I have a pretty good credit score now, because I am trying to pay this down some until it can be resolved.
